pi_items.source: Task description line 5 and setup_task.sh configuration; SMTP is the standard driver for SMTP relay in Laravel/FreeScout
Task description line 5 and setup_task.sh line 18 where mock SMTP server binds to 127.0.0.1; confirmed as localhost address for internal relay testing
Task description line 5 and setup_task.sh line 19 where mock SMTP server listens on port 1025; confirmed as standard testing port for SMTP (used by MailHog, Maildev, and other test SMTP servers)
Task description line 5; confirmed as test email address on reserved .local testing domain; also appears in setup_freescout.sh line 32 (ADMIN_EMAIL)
Task description line 5; confirmed as test sender display name for internal helpdesk testing

privileged_info_summary: This task configures FreeScout email relay to use a locally-running mock SMTP server. All metadata values are verified and correct: mail driver is set to 'smtp' connecting to localhost (127.0.0.1) on port 1025, with sender identity configured as 'notifications@helpdesk.local' (Internal Helpdesk). Port 1025 is a standard development/testing SMTP port. The .local domain is reserved for testing. All configuration values match the task description and test environment setup. Data is synthetic, created specifically for this testing task.
